subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness that there is none other God but Him. His is the dominion and the kingdom, the majesty and the might. He taketh and He giveth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد القلم الاعلی انه لا اله الا هو له الملک و الملکوت و العظمه و الجبروت یاخذ و یعطی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
